items.title: Security Council LIVE: Open debate on women, peace and security
items.title_original: Security Council LIVE: Open debate on women, peace and security
items.summary: The UN Security Council has been meeting in New York for its annual open debate on women, peace and security, in line with a 25-year-old resolution. The Secretary-General’s most recent report on the issue shows that in 2024, women made up only seven percent of negotiators on average worldwide, and nearly nine out of 10 negotiation tracks included no women negotiators at all. Follow live coverage below, and for daily coverage, check out our full meetings coverage here.

items.title: Security Council LIVE: Open debate on women, peace and security
items.title_original: Security Council LIVE: Open debate on women, peace and security
items.summary: The UN Security Council has been meeting in New York for its annual open debate on women, peace and security, in line with a 25-year-old resolution. The Secretary-General’s most recent report on the issue shows that in 2024, women made up only seven percent of negotiators on average worldwide, and nearly nine out of 10 negotiation tracks included no women negotiators at all. Follow live coverage below, and for daily coverage, check out our full meetings coverage here.

items.summary_zh: 由美国卫生与公众服务部战略准备与响应管理局赞助，NASA卓越合作创新中心协助，通过众包竞赛推动数字储备与制造响应网络创新。
items.summaryZh: NASA卓越合作创新中心受HHS下属ASPR委托，发起一项数字储备与制造响应网络挑战赛，旨在征集前瞻性方案。
items.aiSummary: 由美国卫生与公众服务部战略准备与响应管理局赞助，NASA卓越合作创新中心协助，通过众包竞赛推动数字储备与制造响应网络创新。

items.importance: 有助于提升美国公共卫生应急准备与制造响应能力，促进联邦机构间协作创新。
items.summary_short: 由美国卫生与公众服务部战略准备与响应管理局赞助，NASA卓越合作创新中心协助，通过众包竞赛推动数字储备与制造响应网络创新。
summary_points: 该挑战由HHS/ASPR赞助，NASA CoECI借助NASA Tournament Lab执行外部众包竞赛。
旨在征集前瞻性方案，以增强数字储备和制造响应网络能力。
items.why_it_matters: 有助于提升美国公共卫生应急准备与制造响应能力，促进联邦机构间协作创新。
items.impact: 可能推动数字库存管理和应急制造领域的新解决方案，加强应对突发公共卫生事件的整体韧性。
